# catalystcenter_images (Data Source)

This data source fetches all software images uploaded to the Catalyst Center.

Use it to look up an image's `id` by name — useful as input to `catalystcenter_image_distribution`
or `catalystcenter_image_activation` when the image was uploaded out-of-band (not via the
`catalystcenter_image` resource).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "catalystcenter_images" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `images` (Attributes List) List of software images on the Catalyst Center. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--images))

<a id="nestedatt--images"></a>
### Nested Schema for `images`

Read-Only:

- `application_type` (String) Third party application type (for non-Cisco images).
- `family` (String) Image family.
- `id` (String) UUID of the software image. Suitable as input to `catalystcenter_image_distribution` / `_activation`.
- `image_type` (String) Image type (e.g. `SYSTEM_SW`).
- `name` (String) Image file name.
- `vendor` (String) Image vendor.
- `version` (String) Image software version.
